main-page.benefits_title: Benefits of booking bus tickets with GreenBus
main-page.buses_description:
Buy bus tickets online in just a few clicks, without queues or overpayments. GreenBus is a modern aggregator bringing together offers from hundreds of carriers in one place.

No more checking dozens of websites to compare prices or find a convenient bus schedule — we’ve already done it for you.

Planning a trip within Ukraine or a long journey to Europe? Our service offers tickets for international routes to Poland, Germany, the Czech Republic, Italy, and over 20 other countries.
main-page.сarriers_description: We partner only with verified companies. Compare ratings, read real reviews, and choose the best service at the best price.
main-page.popular_button_title: View all available bus routes across Ukraine and Europe
main-page.get_started_description: Organize your trip in a few clicks. Our interactive map helps you choose a route, compare travel times, and check comfort levels. Add stopovers and build the perfect path through your favorite cities.
main-page.questions_description: Answers to key questions about booking, luggage, and travel. Can't find what you need? Our support is always online.
main-page.payment_description: Buy bus tickets online 24/7. Forget about ticket offices — your digital ticket is ready on your smartphone.
main-page.destinations_description: Business or travel — find the perfect route. Choose from over 50,000 bus schedules for any destination.
main-page.secure_description: Your data is fully protected. We use international PCI DSS standards for safe bus ticket booking.
main-page.refunds_description: Plans changed? Refund your bus tickets quickly via your personal account without hassle or calls.

seoText.title: Bus tickets online — fast, convenient, affordable
seoText.p1: Buying a bus ticket on GreenBus is a simple and intuitive process that requires no extra effort. You simply choose your route and date, enter the number of passengers, and proceed to payment. All available trips are updated regularly, so the bus schedule stays up to date. You can pay for your ticket by bank card or another convenient method, and after payment confirmation, your electronic ticket is sent directly to your email.
seoText.p2: Our aggregator brings together offers from bus operators across Europe. Popular destinations include routes to Poland, Germany, the Czech Republic, Austria, Slovakia, and other countries. The system makes it easy to compare prices from different carriers and find the best option. With filters, you can sort trips by departure time, travel duration, number of available seats, or arrival point.
seoText.p3: GreenBus offers routes from Kyiv, Lviv, Odesa, Dnipro, Kharkiv, Vinnytsia, Ivano-Frankivsk, and many other cities in Ukraine. Among international destinations, the most popular are Warsaw, Krakow, Prague, Berlin, Vienna, Budapest, and Bratislava. We constantly expand our route network by adding new destinations, so passengers can travel comfortably and with fewer transfers.
seoText.p4: Our service combines the convenience of online booking with the reliability of the carriers we work with. All companies go through a careful review, which helps ensure safety and comfort during the trip. The website interface is adapted for mobile devices, so you can buy tickets from your phone or tablet at any time. Our support team helps passengers with any questions — from choosing the best route to getting a refund.
